children.label: A
children.text: was built in the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: was not built in the United States and is at least 3 years old; or

children.label: ii
children.text: outside the United States at least 3 years before the certificate requested under subsection (b) would take effect.

children.heading: .—Small passenger vessel; uninspected passenger vessel; passenger for hire
children.label: 2 .—Small passenger vessel; uninspected passenger vessel; passenger for hire
children.text: The terms “small passenger vessel”, “uninspected passenger vessel”, and “passenger for hire” have the meaning given those terms in .section 2101 of this title
the coastwise trade business of any person that employs vessels built in the United States in that business.

children.heading: .—For fraud
children.label: 1 .—For fraud
children.text: The Secretary shall revoke a certificate or endorsement issued under subsection (b) if the Secretary of Transportation, after notice and an opportunity for a hearing, determines that the certificate or endorsement was obtained by fraud.

children.label: A
children.text: the criminal prohibition on fraud and false statements in ; orsection 1001 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: any other authority of the Secretary to revoke a certificate or endorsement issued under subsection (b).
